suites.name: Production Gauntlet 39 (NEW — test_plan.json mapped)
covers: WORD-001..007: prose, bullets, improve, Hindi, context, cancel, PII
SEC-001..007 + 2 sentinel extras: injection, soft-score, DAN, PII output, hallucination, API key, sentinel leakage
MEM-001..004: MemMachine store/recall, PAHF, confidence engine, rejection learning
GOV-001..003 + 2 extras: rate limit, audit trail, ToolGate, enterprise allowlist, plugin permissions
CHAOS-001..005: Ollama down, clipboard lock, double-press, empty UIA, focus loss
INVARIANTS: 1000-step random walk (6 invariants held every step)
E2E PIPELINE: full 9-stage virtual ghost session

bugs_found_and_fixed.root_cause: Test used incorrect Kairo command syntax — // delimiter must be at prompt START, not middle. Kairo's from_prompt() only matches prefixes.
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Corrected test prompt to '// improve this: ...' which properly triggers GhostWrite mode.

bugs_found_and_fixed.root_cause: from_plain_text('Notepad', ...) falls through to UnknownApp because 'notepad' is not in the match arms. Runtime path in main.rs uses from_raw_text(DocKind::PlainText) directly.
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Test now uses from_raw_text() with explicit DocKind::PlainText, matching the actual runtime code path.

bugs_found_and_fixed.root_cause: recall_contextualized granularities=['test'] did not match app_context='Microsoft Word' stored in DB. MemMachine Stage 2 retrieval uses granularity as app_context match value.
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Fixed recall call to pass vec!['Microsoft Word'] matching the stored app_context. Also improved test to store full_episode for richer retrieval.

invariants_verified: INV-1: ConfidenceBand::compute never panics on any input
INV-3: CommandMode::from_prompt never panics; system_hint always non-empty
INV-4: PiiGuard::redact never panics on any input
INV-5: ResponseValidator::validate never panics on any input
INV-6: GhostSession always starts in SessionState::Streaming

security_validation.sentinel_leakage: verified — UUID echo in output returns [BLOCKED: SECURITY POLICY VIOLATION]
security_validation.pii_output_scanning: verified — email/phone in AI output detected

known_limitations: GUI-dependent tests (actual Word/Excel/PPT window interaction) require the daemon running with a real display — covered via headless code-path equivalents in this suite.
Layer 2 property tests run 10K iterations each and take ~9 minutes total — excluded from fast CI path, included in nightly.
Fuzz targets in /fuzz/ directory require 'cargo fuzz' (nightly toolchain) — not run in this session due to stable toolchain constraint.
MEM-001 recall uses mock zero-vector embeddings — semantic similarity ranking not exercised (embedding API not available offline).
